Adrenocorticosteroids in excess may cause:
\boxed{A} To justify my response, I analyzed the articles discussing the effects of excess corticosteroids. Several references explicitly mention that long-term exposure to high levels of glucocorticoids can lead to osteoporosis. Articles like "Secondary Osteoporosis — Pathophysiology" detail how glucocorticoids reduce bone formation and disrupt the Wnt signaling pathway, contributing significantly to osteoporotic changes.
